data.title: Legacy Education (AMEX: LGCY) to report quarterly EPS of $0.12 on 2025-09-25, with investors looking for positive guidance.
data.description: Legacy Education (ticker: LGCY) is set to reveal its quarterly financial results on Thursday, September 25, 2025. Analyst consensus anticipates an earnings per share (EPS) of $0.12. The upcoming announcement is highly anticipated, with investors eager to see if the company exceeds projections and provides favorable guidance. Read more on the complete story at Benzinga.com.

data.title: Seek Labs joins ARPA-H Investor Catalyst Hub & RRPV, aiming for a healthier world; Leverages AI for innovations.
data.description: A biotech company called Seek Labs, headquartered in Salt Lake City, has recently become a part of two key federally-supported innovation networks. The first network is the Investor Catalyst Hub, which is a regional branch of ARPANET-H initiated by the Advanced Research Projects Agency for Health (ARPA-H). The second network is the Rapid Response Partnership Vehicle (RRPV), providing support for the Biomedical Advanced Research and Develop. Seek Labs is focused on promoting a healthier world through AI-driven discovery, programmable therapeutics, and on-site diagnostics. This partnership signifies their commitment to leveraging these networks for further advancement.

data.title: Cigna now covers Cleerly's AI Cardiovascular Imaging tech, impacting 16 million covered lives - effective Oct 1, 2025.
data.description: In Denver, Cleerly, a prominent AI cardiovascular imaging company, revealed that starting on October 1, 2025, Cigna will include coverage for Cleerly LABS Advanced Plaque Analysis. This move marks Cigna as the newest major insurer to endorse the benefits of Artificial Intelligence Enabled CT Based Quantitative Coronary Tomography (AI-QCT)/Coronary Plaque Analysis (AI-CPA) technology for cardiac care. With over 16 million covered lives, this decision highlights the growing recognition of AI technology in improving cardiovascular health.

data.title: Keysight Technologies to showcase 20 AI-enabled 6G & wireless solutions at India Mobile Congress 2025 - accelerating innovation.
data.description: In Santa Rosa, California, Keysight Technologies (NYSE: KEYS) is set to showcase 20 cutting-edge AI-powered 6G and wireless solutions at India Mobile Congress 2025. These technologies aim to expedite innovation in the 6G and wireless sectors. The demonstrations will feature network digital twins, AI-guided channel modeling, and high-fidelity emulation. These tools facilitate swift verification of beamforming, interference management, and ultra-low latency processes, propelling advancements in future 6G and wireless technologies.

data.title: Square Financial Services, Inc. partners with Community Foundation of Utah to launch 25 Squared Grant Initiative, offering microgrants of $2,500 to 25 nonprofit organizations.
data.description: Square Financial Services, Inc., a Utah state-chartered industrial bank and a subsidiary of Block, Inc. (NYSE: XYZ), has commenced the application process for the 25 Squared Grant Initiative, in collaboration with the Community Foundation of Utah (CFU). This initiative follows the achievements of the 24 Squared grant program in 2024 and the 22 Squared program in 2022. Under this program, 25 501(c)(3) nonprofit organizations will be granted microgrants starting at $2,500.

data.title: Celerity Internet and Wispwest upgraded networks with IP Infusion’s OcNOS and IP Maestro on UfiSpace hardware, boosting performance, scalability, and efficiency.
data.description: In Santa Clara, California, IP Infusion unveiled that Gallatin Wireless Internet LLC, operating as Celerity Internet in South Dakota and Wyoming, and Wispwest in Montana, has executed a notable network enhancement. This upgrade, involving the adoption of IP Infusion’s OcNOS and IP Maestro on UfiSpace hardware, aims to bolster network performance, scalability, and efficiency. Gallatin Wireless Internet LLC is a prominent wireless and fiber Internet Service Provider, and this strategic decision signifies their commitment to delivering improved services to their customers.

data.title: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP investigates claims of Sable Offshore investors with losses exceeding $50,000 between May 19 - June 3.
data.description: James (Josh) Wilson, Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who have incurred losses surpassing $50,000 in Sable Offshore between May 19, 2025, and June 3, to reach out directly to him. If you find yourself in this situation, it is advisable to contact him to explore potential options for recourse.

data.title: Supply Chain Digital releases 100 Global Supply Chains Report, highlighting innovation, sustainability, and resilience worldwide.
data.description: London, September 23, 2025 - The latest annual ranking from Supply Chain Digital, a BizClik brand, showcases the leading organizations making strides in innovation, sustainability, and resilience within global supply networks. This comprehensive list highlights companies that are paving the way for progress in these key areas.

data.title: CAKE price up by 3.26%, aiming for $3.15 resistance. Currently at $2.82 with bullish momentum and high volume.
data.description: The cost of CAKE surges to $2.82 driven by bullish momentum indicators and high trading volume, challenging critical resistance levels. Technical analysis points towards ongoing potential for further upward movement.

data.title: FlexPatio Pergola in Colorado integrates smart tech and all-weather comfort for outdoor living. American backyard revolution.
data.description: In Englewood, Colorado on September 24, 2025, it was reported that there is a notable transformation occurring in American backyards. Rather than just seeking basic shade, homeowners are now opting for comprehensive outdoor living spaces that can be utilized throughout the year. This change is highlighted by recent statistics from the United States.

data.title: Cognision and SOMNOmedics partner to advance sleep biomarkers in pharmaceutical trials, boosting neurophysiological solutions in 2025.
data.description: In Louisville, Kentucky, on September 24, 2025, Cognision, a prominent provider of high-performance neurophysiological biomarker solutions and services, revealed a new strategic alliance with SOMNOmedics AG. The latter is a leading global company specializing in cutting-edge sleep diagnostics technology. This partnership aims to enhance the capabilities of both companies by combining their expertise in neurophysiological biomarkers and sleep diagnostics, respectively. The announcement signifies a significant move for both organizations as they seek to leverage each other's strengths in this collaboration.

data.title: Investors with losses above $50,000 in KBR between May 6, 2025, and June 19, 2025, urged to contact Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP.
data.description: Securities Litigation Partner James (Josh) Wilson of Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is urging investors who have experienced losses surpassing $50,000 in KBR during the period from May 6, 2025, to June 19, 2025, to reach out to him for a discussion of available options. If your financial losses meet or exceed $50,000 in KBR within the specified timeframe and you wish to explore potential avenues for recourse, Wilson can provide assistance.
